comments.html:
I can only add that, while I personally lean toward talks in Italian (for obvious cognitive bandwidth reasons 😄), the real deciding factor is always the presenter’s skill. ;-)

As for the parallel tracks experiment—having two channels in the headphones was already clever—but I would have gone one step further and added a third option: a “chaos mix” channel blending both speakers together. Perfect for mentally channel-hopping without actually committing to either talk! LOL
comments.name: Arturo

comments.html: Ivan, it's always a pleasure to meet and talk to you. Your session on using NetLab and the project is a great value to the community and to anyone who truly wants to learn. My presentation on Group Based Policy is available here: https://github.com/nmodena/blog/blob/master/202604-nmodena-EVPN-VXLAN-Group-Based-Policy-ITNOG10.pdf
comments.name: Nicola Modena
